issues: placed on dark dungeon floor reduces contrast slightly
diagonal orientation at small scale may be missed without red arrow aid
no outline/drop-shadow to separate from busy tile texture
reasoning: The longbow composited as a bright white/cream diagonal shape with green and yellow accents against the dark red dungeon floor tile area. Locatability: the white coloring contrasts adequately with the dark background and the elongated diagonal silhouette is distinctive, spotting time roughly 0.5-1s. Distinguishment: clearly not a floor tile or enemy sprite, shape reads as a weapon pickup. Dark-area visibility: asset sits on the darkest region of the scene; white base color saves it but fine detail is somewhat lost in the tile noise. Native-vs-pasted: pixel style is consistent with the scene's aesthetic, scale feels plausible for a longbow. Echoes-cleanliness: bright, uncluttered design fits the Echoes palette. No tonal clash. Main concern is lack of a subtle outline or shadow that would lift it fully off the textured floor; a player without the red arrow hint might take 1-2 extra seconds to spot it on first scan.
